title: deploy.json
description: Configuration file for deploy.local deployments. Place this file in your project root alongside your Dockerfile, package.json, or index.html.

$schema.description: Path or URL to the deploy.json JSON schema.

port.description: The main port your application listens on inside the container. This is the port that gets proxied via the .local URL.

ports.description: Additional ports to expose from the container. Each entry maps a container port to an auto-assigned host port.

container.description: The port inside the container to expose.

protocol.description: The protocol for the port mapping.

discoverable.description: Makes the deployment discoverable via mDNS for local service discovery.

gpus.description: Enables GPU support by passing --gpus all to the Docker container on startup.

ignore.description: Additional file or directory patterns to exclude from the upload bundle. node_modules and .git are always excluded. In git repositories, .gitignore patterns are also respected automatically.
